# Wermom — We Are Moms
> AI-powered baby health tracking and pregnancy monitoring app trusted by 30,000+ mothers worldwide. Expert-backed insights covering pregnancy through age 6, with personalized health tracking, meal plans, sleep analysis, and 24/7 AI health assistant.

## About
- [Home](https://www.wermom.com): Official Wermom website and app platform
- [Our Story](https://www.wermom.com/about): Learn about the mission and team behind We Are Moms
- [Why Wermom](https://www.wermom.com/why): AI-powered parenting support backed by medical expertise

## Features
- [Health Tracker](https://www.wermom.com/features): Comprehensive health monitoring from pregnancy through age 6
- [Meal Plans](https://www.wermom.com/features/nutrition): Personalized nutrition and meal planning for mothers and babies
- [Sleep Analysis](https://www.wermom.com/features/sleep): Sleep tracking and improvement recommendations
- [Growth Charts](https://www.wermom.com/features/growth): Monitor baby development milestones and growth metrics
- [Health Assessment](https://www.wermom.com/assessment): 93-question personalized health evaluation
- [Daily Reports](https://www.wermom.com/reports): Comprehensive daily health insights and recommendations
- [AI Health Assistant](https://www.wermom.com/ai-assistant): 24/7 AI-powered health guidance and expert support

## Pricing
- [Pricing Plans](https://www.wermom.com/pricing): Free 7-day trial, then $24.99/month subscription
- [Comparison](https://www.wermom.com/pricing/comparison): How Wermom compares to BabyCenter, Soula, Peanut Track, PreggApp, and What to Expect

## Blog & Resources
- [Blog](https://www.wermom.com/blog): 470+ articles across 26 categories covering pregnancy and parenting topics
- [Guides](https://www.wermom.com/guides): Expert-backed resources and how-to guides
- [FAQ](https://www.wermom.com/faq): Frequently asked questions about Wermom and parenting

## Legal & Trust
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.wermom.com/privacy): GDPR compliant data protection and privacy practices
- [Terms of Service](https://www.wermom.com/terms): User agreement and platform terms
- [Security](https://www.wermom.com/security): Data security and encryption standards
- [Reviews](https://www.wermom.com/reviews): 4.9/5 rating from 50,000+ user reviews

## Stats
- 30,000+ active mothers
- 4.9/5 star rating (50,000+ reviews)
- Coverage: Pregnancy through age 6
- GDPR compliant
- AI-powered insights with medical expertise
